description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a node_modules/ cache. Define a test stage with four jobs: compile runs alias yarn='yarn --non-interactive --frozen-lockfile', yarn config set unsafe-perm true, yarn install then yarn run compile; test:mocha 6 runs the same before_script on a node:6 image and executes yarn run test:mocha 6; test:mocha 8 runs on the default node:8 image and executes yarn run test:mocha 8; test:tslint runs on node:8 and executes yarn run test:tslint. All test jobs use the docker tag and set NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn. Add a deploy stage with two jobs: deploy:npm-dev and deploy:npm-latest both write an npm auth token from $NPM_TOKEN to ~/.npmrc, install ci-build-version globally, and publish the package to npm with a tag variable (dev for the develop branch, latest for git tags) using yarn publish; deploy:npm-dev runs only on the develop branch of janslow/ci-build-version and uses the npm-registry tag, while deploy:npm-latest runs only on tags of the same project.
